description.ko: 빛조차 닿지 않는 해저의 압도적인 어둠 속에서, 생물 발광의 경이로움이 생명력을 불어넣는 깊은 바다의 미지의 신비를 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the untouched mysteries of the deep ocean, where light fades and bioluminescent wonders bring life to the crushing darkness of the seafloor.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean abyss, bioluminescent jellyfish and rare deep-sea creatures glowing in the dark, ancient shipwrecks and mysterious underwater caverns, ethereal turquoise and navy blue lighting, high detail, photorealistic, 8k resolution, atmospheric pressure effects.
